task_completion.description: Verify the tiddler is created with the correct title and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled exactly 'Medication Explorer' with a 'Dashboard' tag pill visible at the top.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard features a two-column layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visual left/right split in the rendered tiddler, or wikitext in the editor using HTML/CSS (e.g., flexbox, grid, or side-by-side divs) to create two columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the left pane lists all tiddlers tagged 'Medication'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of medication names (rendered as links or buttons) in the left column, or wikitext using a list widget like `<$list filter="[tag[Medication]]">`.

task_completion.description: Verify the right pane displays the correct empty state text when no medication is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Please select a medication.' rendered in the right pane, or wikitext conditionally displaying this text when the state tiddler (e.g., `$:/state/selected-med`) is empty.

task_completion.description: Verify the right pane displays the required labels and field values for the selected medication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the labels 'Class:', 'Indications:', and 'Side Effects:' rendered in the right pane with accompanying data, or wikitext transcluding the fields `drug-class`, `indications`, and `common-side-effects`.

task_completion.description: Verify the right pane displays the selected medication's title as a heading and its body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the selected medication's name formatted as a heading (e.g., H1, H2, H3) followed by descriptive paragraph text in the right pane, or wikitext transcluding the title as a heading and the text body.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the TiddlyWiki application running in a web browser, with evidence of using the UI to create or edit the tiddler.

integrity.description: Verify the medication list is generated dynamically rather than hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the wikitext editor, look for a filter or list widget (e.g., `[tag[Medication]]`) rather than a manually typed list of 15 medication names.

integrity.description: Verify the details pane uses dynamic transclusion for the selected medication.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the wikitext editor, look for variables or transclusions (e.g., `{{!!drug-class}}` or `<$transclude/>`) rather than hardcoded text about a specific medication.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected tiddler title is exactly 'Medication Explorer' and must have the tag 'Dashboard'. The empty state text in the right pane must be exactly 'Please select a medication.' The medication data is pre-populated, so the left pane should dynamically list them using TiddlyWiki filter logic.
